query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with long, wavy dark hair cascading over their shoulders. The person is wearing what appears to be a brown garment with a textured collar. Their lips are colored with an orange tone, and their gaze is directed toward the viewer with visible light-colored eyes. The image has a soft, muted overall tone with limited color variation beyond the lip color.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred close-up portrait with smeared, indistinct details throughout. The person has long, wavy dark hair that dissolves into soft masses without individual strand definition. Facial features and skin texture are mushy and lack fine detail, with surfaces blending into ambiguity. The image has a dreamlike, soft-focus quality with a pale, muted palette, and only the orange lip color maintains any distinctness against the overall vagueness.
